payload.title: WP1 sessions tmux: scroll molette copy-mode (fait: bindings live+image), accents OK
WP2 launcher: registre sessions live local+remote + autoenrollement + layout auto-enregistre
WP3 RWX partage finalisation: GC TTL sous-repertoires + 4Gi default
WP4 auth: announce porte home/startupArgs (refresh sans perte) puis auto-refresh token
WP5 conversations: single-writer lease
WP6 remote sync + diff --files/--session
WP7 h2a: wake local-tmux dans remote run + bridge pod
WP8 infra: slim image + pre-pull + durabilite store CP
WP9 remote plugin add/sync multi-CLI local+remote (track=1er)
WP4-suite: refresh reconstruit --resume depuis le cliSessionId le plus frais (announce fige celui d origine)
deps: purger les 4 vulns moderees Dependabot (politique latest stable)
profiles.ts: resumeFlag --continue (codex/agy) incoherent avec soft-refresh (codex resume <id> / agy --resume) — migrate genere un argv codex probablement invalide
deps majors a tester un par un: @hono/node-server 1->2, commander 14->15, @types/node 22->25, @sent-tech/components-svelte 0.1->0.2

vuln LOW cookie<0.7 (transitive @sveltejs/kit, SSR operator-ui): override cookie ^0.7.2 present dans package.json mais NON honore par npm 11.16 (overrides reste null dans le lock, regen complet ne mord pas). A investiguer: attendre kit avec cookie 0.7+, ou override imbrique sous @sveltejs/kit

deps majors restants: @hono/node-server 1->2 (adapter HTTP CP, test runtime/docker dedie requis), @sent-tech/components-svelte 0.1->0.2 (design system operator-ui, check visuel). NB @types/node reste 22.x (doit suivre le runtime Docker node:22, PAS 25). commander 15 FAIT (b0581ff)
components-svelte 0.2: compile+build+svelte-check OK (aucune rupture API) — RESTE: revue visuelle operator-ui avant adoption (changement design-system, console user-facing). Pret a merger sur go.
operator-ui: migrer @sent-tech/components-svelte (0.2 deprecated/renamed) -> @sentropic/design-system-svelte (idem tokens/themes)
relaunch hint: session terminee affiche la commande de relance (remote run … / remote attach … --exec)
node-server reste en 1.x (node-ws peer ^1.19.11; v2 cassait les installs from-scratch et bloquait l override cookie) — @types/node reste 22.x (runtime Docker node:22); commander 15 adopte
write-probe-0.10.6

garde single-writer bloque ~80% des sessions apres crash: entrees hook kind:local sans pid traitees vivantes a jamais (SessionEnd non declenche) + reutilisation PID. Fix 412330f: no-pid=warning non bloquant, verifiables(tmux/pid+cmdline/remote)=hard, boot-guard
fan-out REMOTE: remote migrate forward --count N (N pods). Local fait (remote run --count 194269d). Touche creation workspaces/pods + RWX partage -> passe dediee

browser/Playwright dans le pod (2FA + sites authentifies): protocole browser.* + uat-exposure-policy defini, browser-bridge=stub. remote forward (724c896)=transport. Fork design: noVNC headful vs CDP/Playwright

propager les SKILLS/plugins Claude Code aux pods (superpowers, track@sentropic, skill h2a, graphify, sent-tech-design): remote plugin ne fait que le npm/MCP; besoin d un sync de ~/.claude/skills + ~/.claude/plugins (installed_plugins.json+marketplaces+cache) vers les pods. Fork: copier le cache (deterministe) vs re-install marketplace in-pod
track 0.2.2 ecriture cassee (item new/spec/accept no-op) -> upgrade @sentropic/track 0.10.6 repare; propager 0.10.6 aux pods FAIT

payload.body: Converger les CLI de l ecosysteme sur des conventions communes pour qu elles s installent/s enregistrent/s integrent uniformement (dans remote ET dans l app sentropic). Constat: deja ESM type:module, bin, Node>=20; track+h2a-cli exposent CLI+MCP (@modelcontextprotocol/sdk); harness=gate workflow; graphify=skill+CLI. Divergences a reduire: garde d entrypoint realpathSync (bug bin npm-global), manifeste d install commun (npm/curl/script via remote plugin), surface MCP commune, et remote a publier au format @sentropic.
payload.title: Aligner les CLI @sentropic (track, h2a, harness, graphify, stp, design-system) + integrabilite dans l app sentropic

payload.statement: Chaque CLI @sentropic a un entrypoint protege par realpathSync (jamais de no-op via le symlink npm-global, cf bug track 0.2.2)
remote plugin installe chaque outil par sa methode (npm/curl/script) et l enregistre (MCP/CLI/skill) dans les pods
remote est packageable/installable au format @sentropic (bin ESM, Node>=20, MCP si pertinent) -> integrable dans l app sentropic

payload.body: harness check <branch|scope> --profile sentropic valide les conventions de branche/scope du dev AI. L adopter = le cabler dans la verif du repo (npm run verify / pre-push) pour que remote respecte le meme workflow que l ecosysteme. Etat: harness 0.1.1 installe; check branch + scope = pass sur le repo.
payload.title: Adopter la CLI harness comme gate de workflow dans remote (check branch/scope, profile sentropic)

payload.statement: harness check branch + scope cables dans la verif du repo et verts

payload.title: node service / @hono/node-server v2: BLOQUE upstream (node-ws 1.3.1 peer ^1.19.11). Reste 1.x tant que node-ws ne supporte pas v2. A re-evaluer quand node-ws bouge.
Sessions & tmux UX (scroll, registre/restore, relaunch, copie)
Auth & credentials (announce parity, refresh --all/--watch, resume argv)
Storage RWX partage & GC
Conversations: sync/diff, single-writer, fan-out
h2a + browser/UAT (2FA, forward)
Infra, image & deps

payload.body: remote doit pouvoir DELEGUER un agent de type quelconque (claude/codex/agy) dans une session tmux, local ou pod SCW, en ASYNC. Cadrer: methode d execution async (lancement detache), SUPERVISION (etat live), CALLBACK de fin de job, dialogue parent/maitre via h2a (feedback loop quand une decision est requise). NON limite a 4: tres grand nombre possible, cap defaut 16 concurrents (local ou remote, au choix user). S inspirer de Hermes (nous.ai, open source) pour l encadrement/orchestration. Conductor delegatif autour de track. Design a valider via double revue codex 5.5 high + claude opus 4.8 max avant dev.
payload.title: Delegation d agents CROSS-TYPE async (claude/codex/agy) en tmux, local OU remote, superviseable

payload.statement: remote delegate <type> <task> [--remote] lance un agent claude/codex/agy detache dans tmux (local ou pod), retourne un job id
supervision: remote jobs ls / status montre l etat live (running/awaiting-decision/done/failed) de chaque job delegue
callback de fin: a la terminaison, le job notifie le parent (h2a) avec resultat + artefacts
feedback loop: un job bloque sur decision envoie une demande au parent via h2a et attend la reponse
concurrence: cap configurable, defaut 16, applique local et remote; au-dela en file

payload.title: P1 delegation LOCALE interactive: remote delegate <type> task (tmux vivant +h2a side-window, worktree, role:job dans registry) + remote jobs ls/status/attach/logs; --headless option

P2 delegation REMOTE: remote delegate <type> task --remote (pod via createRemoteSession+startupArgs, CONCURRENT sur RWX partage subPath), reconciliation cluster (listRemoteSessions->dead=failed), jobs attach --exec

P3 callback+feedback: job.done emis a la fin (hook claude SessionEnd pour role:job / wrapper headless) vers le parent via h2a; canal decision (decision.requested agent->parent, remote jobs decide <id> reponse -> decision.reply); jobs decisions + etat awaiting-decision

P4 conductor: remote jobs conduct --watch (boucle foreground tmux) + cap concurrence defaut 16 (local ET remote) + queue (pending->running quand slot libre) + --max-depth (1-3) + miroir track (chaque job = item enfant du WP)

Remediation revue a2a-cli: H1 job interactif jamais complete (session_id vs slug -> REMOTE_JOB_ID env), H2 result.json relu via process.cwd au lieu de originCwd (faux failed), S2 cap non-atomique (launch conductor-only/lock), S1 job.done/decision.reply non authentifies (verifier actor.instance), M2 sweep timeout->failed, M3 jobs ls signale absence de conductor; YAGNI: decision-channel=experimental, depth-recursion/track-mirror differes, remote derriere fix concurrence

payload.body: Contrat a2a-cli (h2a 0.68.0): quand un workspace a du travail STALLED (track workspace-activity idle>24h) ET aucun conductor vivant, h2a emet a remote une enveloppe body.topic=conductor-launch-request {workspaceId(ws:sha256 durable), hostPref:[claude,codex,agy], stalled:[{id,title,reason,since}], reason}. Remote NE spawne que sur reception. A cabler: handler idempotent (skip si conductor du workspace deja vivant via h2a discover/conductor + nos role:job conductor) -> remote delegate <host> -> claim role conductor au boot -> gate --confirm. S appuie sur la delegation P1-P4 deja livree. NB: aligner le mapping workspace-id durable (ws:sha256) cote remote.
payload.title: h2a conductor-launch: handler remote des enveloppes conductor-launch-request (lance un conductor via remote delegate, idempotent, claim role h2a, --confirm)

payload.statement: remote plugin sync-skills propage skills+plugins (whitelist-only, secrets exclus) vers les pods
handler conductor-launch-request: idempotent + selectHost(hostPref) + delegate + --confirm + cooldown 30min

payload.body: Livré v0.5.1 commit 14e0301: conductor-launch.ts (pur, 43 tests) + wiring index.ts. Defaults reversibles documentes. A aligner avec a2a-cli: canonicalisation ws:sha256 + shape h2a discover.
payload.title: remote conductor-launch [--confirm --watch --cooldown]: parse+validate envelope, selectHost(hostPref), idempotence (slug deterministe + h2a discover), launch via startJob, cooldown 30min/ws, durable ws:sha256 id

payload.body: verify = harness:check && format && lint && typecheck && build && test. devDep @sentropic/harness ^0.1.1. Verifie en live: PASS C1 + PASS C2.
payload.title: harness check branch+scope (profile sentropic) câblé en tête de 'verify' (npm run harness:check) — PASS C1/C2
